name: Execution of Non-DLL Using Rundll32
notes:
This rule detects Rundll32.exe running non-dll

Covered from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Hieu Tran
SIGMA Title: Suspicious Rundll32 Execution With Image Extension
SIGMA Description: Detects the execution of Rundll32.exe with DLL files masquerading as image files


Confidence: LOW

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success
when the event matches Process Name (custom) is any of rundll32.exe
when the event matches LOWER("Command") MATCHES '.*(\.bmp|\.cr2|\.eps|\.gif|\.ico|\.jpeg|\.jpg|\.nef|\.orf|\.png|\.raw|\.sr2|\.tif|\.tiff).*' AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Execution of Non-DLL Using Rundll32 on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success
AND when the event matches Process Name (custom) is any of rundll32.exe
AND when the event matches LOWER("Command") MATCHES '.*(\.bmp|\.cr2|\.eps|\.gif|\.ico|\.jpeg|\.jpg|\.nef|\.orf|\.png|\.raw|\.sr2|\.tif|\.tiff).*' AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: Execution of Non-DLL Using rundll32.exe
Event description: Detects Rundll32.exe running non-dll
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
